{{Quote|You'll have to catch me first.|Kalast|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref>}}
'''Kalast''' was an [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who betrayed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Sir, we're having trouble apprehending Moff Kalast. His star destroyer is one of the newer models, and we've been unable to succesfully engage him before he enters hypersapce|An Imperial officer to Grand Moff Tarkin, regading the now rebel controlled Imperial-II ''Avenger''|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War" />}}
[[File:Capture_of_Kalast.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Kalast would openly oppose the Empire using his ''Imperial II''-class star destroyer, ''Avenger'', until he was captured alongside his vessel by Darth Vader.]]
Using the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] to gain top priority secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] codes for the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], he slipped the data into the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] hands. He later met up with the Alliance in a secret installation on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], intent on discovering the identity of the traitor, tracked him to Thyferra and led an attack force on the planet. Kalast was able to escape because the Imperial fleet was detected using a sensor system.

In a prototype [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] named the [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']], he remained in his retreat above [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]]. His Star Destroyer was also painted with red markings, showing Rebellion affiliation. The Empire [[Arrest over Atzerri|tracked him down]] there, and the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] moved into the system. Kalast jumped into hyperspace and escaped. After the siege of his Atzerri retreat, he fled to a number of worlds, until any further retreat on his part was stopped by an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]. His flagship was severely damaged, and he [[Capture of Kalast|surrendered]].

He was interrogated by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself and, under [[Torture/Legends|torture]], he revealed that he gave the top secret plans to the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]. After his usefulness was over, Kalast was executed for treason.
